---
title: "Lady Rachel Mary Scott"
---

## Lady Rachel Mary Scott

**Dates:** (d.1911)

### Description

daughter of the 3rd Earl of Clonmell

### Biography

She married (1866) Llewellyn Saunderson (d. 1913). [LGI 1914]

### Letters

- Letter from October 1, 1857

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
